---
title: 'Joy of Quilting'
date: '2014-03-13T02:21:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Texas Cows and Crafts'
blogger_status: 'DRAFT'
blogger_post_id: '5949438738043505436'
blogger_filename: '/2014/03/joy-of-quilting.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Texas Cows and Crafts/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Quilts'
---

Recently found out that I enjoy quilting...
